description: Generated from shared/locators/*.json. Edit module files, not this one. Run scripts/build-locator-map.mjs to rebuild.

address_book.form.address_clear.notes: 仅在地址栏有内容时显示，与粘贴按钮互斥

global.modal.backdrop.notes: QA-AGENTS fallback overlay selector; not extracted from app-monorepo testID scan.

global.modal.container.notes: All modal-scoped element search should prefer this container first.

global.overlay.popover.notes: Known blocking overlay in desktop flow.

market.action.button.notes: Generic action CTA inside market swap panel; keep page-scoped to avoid global overloading.

security.password.input.notes: Existing QA-AGENTS stable selector; not discovered in current app-monorepo scan subset.

security.password.verifying.notes: Existing QA-AGENTS stable selector; not discovered in current app-monorepo scan subset.

wallet.account.selector.item_by_index.notes: Pattern selector derived from app-monorepo indexed account rows.

wallet.account.selector.modal.notes: Account selector container surfaced in swap review dialog.

wallet.approval.unsupported_empty_state.notes: Dedicated empty state for unsupported approval assets.

wallet.home.sidebar.notes: Existing reliable selector in QA-AGENTS ui-map; not yet found in app-monorepo testID scan result.

wallet.send.amount_input.notes: v6.2.0: 金额输入在独立的「输入金额」页面（modal 内），placeholder 为 0。不一定在 send-recipient-amount-form 内。

wallet.send.contacts_button.notes: DEPRECATED v6.2.0: 新 UI 改为 send form 内 tab 切换（最近/账户/地址簿），不再用 SvgPeopleCircle 图标。改用 wallet.send.recipient_tab_accounts。

wallet.send.contacts_popover.notes: DEPRECATED v6.2.0: 收款人选择不再用 popover，改为 send form 内嵌 tab。

wallet.send.recipient_tab_accounts.notes: v6.2.0 新 UI: 发送表单内「最近/账户/地址簿」tab，点击「账户」显示我的账户列表。pattern selector，source_testid 为父容器。

wallet.send.recipient_item.notes: 收款人列表项，testid 格式 recipient-item-{address}。点击选择收款人。pattern selector，source_testid 为动态模板。

wallet.send.memo_field.notes: 备注/Memo 输入框，placeholder 含「备忘标签 (Memo, Tag, Comment)」。Cosmos 系链可见。无 data-testid，通过 placeholder 定位。

wallet.send.max_button.notes: Derived semantic selector using form container + localized text.
